# EU AI Evidence Builder

> Self-hosted EU AI Act package builder and starter workflow for tool-using AI agents.

## Start here
- [English homepage](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/)
- [Technical Overview](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/technology/)
- [How it works](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/how-it-works/)
- [Builder](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/builder/)
- [Documentation templates](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/templates/)

## Public path
- [Builder](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/builder/)
- [Sample EU package](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/eu-ai-act-demo/)
- [EU starter](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/eu-ai-act-starter/)
- [Pricing](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/pricing/)

## Product boundary
- Core evidence engine for tool-using AI agents
- EU AI Act vertical with provider-side documentation and technical evidence from real runs
- Article 12-style record-keeping supports, but does not replace, the wider provider-side package
- Not legal advice, legal classification, or final sign-off automation

## Languages
- [English](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/en/)
- [Deutsch](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/de/)
- [Français](https://tanyayvr.github.io/agent-qa-toolkit/fr/)

- [EU verification checklist](https://github.com/Tanyayvr/agent-qa-toolkit/blob/main/products/eu-ai-act/docs/verification.md)
